title: Structory - Multi Blocks Structures
description: Structory allows players to create multi-block structures easily and intuitively. Currently, it supports the creation of structures like altars, but it is designed to be easily extendable with new structures.
body:
![Structory Banner](https://i.imgur.com/kmRvT4z.png)


Structory allows players to create multi-block structures easily and intuitively. Currently, it supports the creation of structures like altars, but it is designed to be easily extendable with new structures.

## What's This Plugin?

If you're looking to add new crafting methods, this plugin is perfect for you.
It allows you to define custom structures that players can build and activate, and use as crafting stations.
You can create an unlimited number of new recipes using various filters for item ingredients—such as material type, custom item models, names, enchantments, and more.
You can also use  items saved via command as ingredients (Limited to 10 for FREE version).

<iframe width="280" height="157" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/9Xef3zvsnr8" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## Disclaimer
This plugin does not generate structures in the world automatically. Players must manually build the defined structures and activate them using `Shift + Right Click`.

## Features
- Easy to Configure: The plugin is designed to be user-friendly, with a simple and quick configuration process.
- Support for Multiple Structures: Register how many structures you want !
- Compatibility: Compatible with the latest versions of Minecraft.
- Optimized Performance: The plugin is optimized to ensure high performance without compromising the gaming experience.


## Commands
- /structory item save [name] - structory.cmd.item.save - Save held item to file.
- /structory item delete <name> - structory.cmd.item.delete - Delete custom item.
- /structory item get <name> - structory.cmd.item.get - Get copy of saved item
- /structory - structory.cmd.use to access the commands (still needs each single permission)
- /structory item replace <name> - structory.cmd.item.replace- Replace directly the saved item with current held item

## Configuration
The plugin comes with a set of ready-to-use examples to help you get started quickly.
Defining new Recipes and Structures is simple and intuitive. Just create a new file inside the `structures` and `recipes` folders, making sure to follow the correct formatting.

For detailed instructions on how to properly register new Structures and Recipes, refer to the official [Wiki](https://andreadada.github.io/dadadocu/docs/structory/intro)

## How to Install
Download the plugin
Copy the plugin file into your Minecraft server’s plugins folder.
Restart the server to load the plugin.
Configure the plugin according to your preferences using the provided configuration file.


## Support & Docs
For any questions or issues join discord: https://discord.gg/KBNDByfjuC
You  can find the docs following this [Link](https://andreadada.github.io/dadadocu/docs/structory/intro)
